name: Electric Hand Planer 3-1/4"
tagline: Professional 3-1/4 inch electric hand planer with 6.0 Amp motor delivering 34,000 RPM for fast, smooth planing. Includes a parallel fence for consistent results and a depth adjustment knob for precise control. Ideal for door fitting, joist planing, and surface leveling.
description: Professional 3-1/4 inch electric hand planer with 6.0 Amp motor delivering 34,000 RPM for fast, smooth planing. Includes a parallel fence for consistent results and a depth adjustment knob for precise control. Ideal for door fitting, joist planing, and surface leveling.
userBenefits: 6.0 Amp motor at 34,000 RPM delivers smooth, splinter-free cuts even in dense hardwoods
16-position depth adjustment knob allows precise cuts from 0 to 1/8" for fine-tuned material removal
Parallel fence ensures consistent, straight planing along edges for door fitting and board jointing
Dual-side chip ejection lets you direct shavings left or right to keep your work area clear
Reversible carbide blades double cutting life by flipping to the unused edge when one side dulls
